# Aiadverts — AI Advertising Agency

Aiadverts is South Africa's leading AI advertising agency, creating cinematic AI-generated video and image adverts for businesses across Durban, Johannesburg, Cape Town, Pietermaritzburg and all of South Africa.

## What We Do
We use proprietary AI technology to produce scroll-stopping video adverts, stunning product images and complete social media content — delivered in days at a fraction of traditional production costs.

## Services
- AI Video Adverts — cinematic product videos and brand films
- AI Image Adverts — professional product photography and brand imagery
- Social Media Management — complete monthly content management

## Pricing
- Starter: From R1,500 per advert
- Growth: From R3,000 per month
- Premium: From R8,000 per month

## Location
Based in Durban, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.
Serving all of South Africa digitally.

## Contact
Email: vip@webafy.co.za
Website: https://aiadverts.co.za
